metadata.name: Trinity [REP/REP+]
metadata.description:
A mod that adds three active items, passive items, trinkets, and playable characters.
Active Items: - Mirror of Hearts - Hacker Laptop - Chessboard
Passive Items: - D-Clover - Paper Knife - Worn Tire
Trinkets: - Old Credit Card - Maggie's Drawing - Fire Killer
Characters: - Mary - Peter - Isaiah
Cover art by: @luh_artwork (Instagram)
Character Stage Portrait by: ArtMocha (Steam)
(Made in Brazil)
